headline: US airline stocks slip as oil surges after Trump rejects Iran peace proposal
summary: Investing.com -- Oil prices surged on Monday after President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest response to a U.S. peace proposal as "totally unacceptable," pushing U.S. airline stocks lower in premarket trading as investors weighed the prospect of a prolonged supply disruption.
